Wer hinter Jesus Punkt steht: unser Team: The people behind Jesus Punkt: our team, our faith, our values and the church's story.
Jesus Punkt ist eine evangelische Freiki: Jesus Punkt is a protestant free church. Full of life, contemporary and passionate about life with Jesus — right in the middle of Neubrandenburg.
Viele Hände, ein Zuhause. Diese Menschen: Many hands, one home. These people carry responsibility at Jesus Punkt — and would love to meet you.
Leitet die Gemeinde seit Oktober 2025. P: Has led the church since October 2025. Philipp's passion is preaching God's word and seeing people grow in their calling and their faith.
Wir glauben an den dreieinigen Gott, der: We believe in the triune God, who has revealed himself as Father, Son and Holy Spirit, and to whom every single person is accountable for their life. No one manages to live up to the standards of the righteous God — which makes us guilty before him.
Aus bedingungsloser Liebe zu uns Mensche: Out of unconditional love for us, God himself became human in Jesus Christ and died on the cross in our place to settle this guilt. Only through him is a reconciled life in fellowship with God possible. It gives every person the opportunity to become part of his worldwide church, which finds its expression in the local congregation.
Der Heilige Geist erneuert und verändert: The Holy Spirit renews and transforms the lives of believers. God fills people with his Spirit and gives authority and gifts for service. Jesus Christ is risen and will come again — that is why Christians have the certain hope of eternal life with him.
Unser Glaube gründet sich auf Gottes Wor: Our faith is founded on God's word, the Bible.
Mit Christen auf der ganzen Welt verbind: The Apostles' Creed unites us with Christians all over the world.
Wie aus einem Anfang im Wohnzimmer ein Z: How a beginning in a living room became a home for many.
Seit 2011 sind Annette und Rainer Dworni: Annette and Rainer Dwornik have been a vital part of Jesus Punkt since 2011, with heart and soul from the very beginning. From March 2014 to March 2025 they served on the leadership team. Rainer knows the land and people of Mecklenburg-Vorpommern like few others; Annette has found a new home here. They remain pillars of our church.
Im Januar 2019 kamen Ruth und Stephan Fu: In January 2019 Ruth and Stephan Fuhrer joined the leadership team from Switzerland. They supported the church leadership in renovating the building and developing Jesus Punkt — with a focus on practical work, housekeeping and hospitality. In April 2021 they returned home to Rheinfelden.
Ab Juni 2020 war Simeon Schütz Teil der: From June 2020 Simeon Schütz was part of the church leadership. Sound, video and streaming technology were his passion — and as the youngest member of the team, the young generation was close to his heart. Simeon left Neubrandenburg in January 2022.
Friederike und Claus sind seit 2023 in d: Friederike and Claus have served in the church leadership since 2023 and have two children. Jesus Punkt has been their spiritual home for a long time. Through their dedication they invest in the young generation in youth work and the worship team.
Nach seinem Theologiestudium am Theologi: After studying theology at the Theologisches Seminar Erzhausen, Philipp Strauch completed his main internship at Jesus Punkt in 2023 and has been part of the church leadership ever since. From October 2023 to October 2025 he served his two-year vicariate in the church.
Im Oktober 2025 hat Günther Seidt die Le: In October 2025 Günther Seidt handed the leadership of the church over to Philipp Strauch, who has been its new pastor ever since — carrying on the vision of Günther and Loni. Günther and Loni continue to serve in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern and remain committed members of Jesus Punkt.

Wir sind für dich da — auch über den Son: We're here for you — beyond Sunday too. Personal, confidential and from the heart.
Vertrauliche Beratung bei Fragen zu Bezi: Confidential counselling on relationships, marriage, sexuality and life crises — professional and respectful.
Wir gestalten eure Trauung mit — persönl: We help shape your wedding ceremony — personal, celebratory and with a message that carries.
